name: seo-analyzer
title: SEO Analyzer - Free Website SEO Audit & Score
description: Free Ahrefs Site Audit & Screaming Frog alternative. Analyze any webpage for 15+ SEO factors: title, meta description, headings, images, links, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, JSON-LD structured data, canonical, robots. Get a weighted SEO score (0-100). Bulk URL processing, CI/CD integration, no API keys required.
